title: Red stuff at end of 10
wikitext:
[]: Red stuff at end of 1.0?             Quote Post by mrpanda » Fri Feb 15, 2008 1:19 pm Wtf is that giant red stain. I think it might be part of a larger image that we wont see untill 2.0 but im not sure, any ideas ??????????[/url]

[]:             Quote Post by eva unit 04 » Fri Feb 15, 2008 2:02 pm it's the blood stain across the moon everyone's talking about

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Fri Feb 15, 2008 2:10 pm Lilith's blood. Moon Giant's blood. Adam's Blood. Take your pick.

[]:             Quote Post by universalperson » Fri Feb 15, 2008 3:37 pm The remains of Reichu's sacrifices to Yui-sama?

[]:             Quote Post by mrpanda » Fri Feb 15, 2008 6:02 pm Hmm it kinda resembles a red carpet.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Fri Feb 15, 2008 7:20 pm Oops, I guess I answered in the other thread too soon. Didn't know this was that. Like I said there, It looks like the streak of blood across the moon aftert 3I. But this shot is before any potential 3I. Perhaps foreshadowing?

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Fri Feb 15, 2008 10:09 pm It's easy to know. Notice the unknown giant? It just had one hell of period, and it's not like there's tampons on the moon...

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Feb 15, 2008 10:49 pm Adam popped like a giant water balloon at 2I, turning the oceans red and splattering blood as far as the Moon.

[]:             Quote Post by mrpanda » Sun Feb 17, 2008 2:26 pm Reichu wrote: Adam popped like a giant water balloon at 2I, turning the oceans red and splattering blood as far as the Moon.
